name: JCET Group Co., Ltd.
summary: JCET Group Co., Ltd. provides semiconductor system integration packaging and test services worldwide. The company offers wafer level, system in package, flip chip, and wire bonding products for various semiconductor applications, such as mobile, communication, compute, consumer, automotive and industry, etc. It also provides design and characterization, research and development, water bump, package assembly, shipment, and reliability test services. The company was formerly known as Jiangsu Changjiang Electronics Technology Co., Ltd. and changed its name to JCET Group Co., Ltd. in November 2019. JCET Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 1972 and is based in Jiangyin, China.
